title: pernettya pentlandii var. parvifolia
intro: Pernettya pentlandii var. parvifolia, also known as the dwarf snowberry or dwarf white coralberry, is a small shrub native to the Himalayan region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and alleviate digestive issues. Traditionally, Pernettya pentlandii var. parvifolia has been used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and tinctures, to treat a range of ailments.
